examples: It was extremely important to the destiny of humankind.
When Pandora's box was opened, it unleashed swarms of diseases and disasters upon humankind.
It seems that humankind is to be destroyed because they irritate the gods with their tumult and noise.
The Web is a powerful example of the way that basic research benefits humankind.
Lifting humankind out of the dirt is an important part of the progressive project.
